series_metadata.series_description: Applications submitted for a nomination to become a member of the Credential Review Board. Members of the Credentials Review Board shall assess the credentials of individuals pursuing alternative routes to Educator Licensure and out of state Educators seeking licensure in Ohio according to O.R.C. 3319.65.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: , if application is scanned into a computer system, ensure its quality and completeness before discarding paper. ; Electronic
